note: Issue data for ROADMAP MAIN. Created as GitHub issues #167-#179 after explicit approval. Cleanup tracking issues #169 and #177-#179 were closed as completed after the approved cleanup was applied. It avoids EPIC-21 through EPIC-26 duplicate implementation tasks.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN-01: Executable Artifact-Path Alpha Verification
epics.summary: Verify the minimal supported alpha path: sloppyc build, V8-enabled sloppy run --artifacts, GET dispatch, and supported HTTP responses.
epics.goal: Prove the already-landed EPIC-21 through EPIC-24 pieces work as one minimal end-to-end alpha workflow without recreating those implementation tasks.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN-02: MAIN Evidence and Gate Report
epics.summary: Lock the evidence model for default, V8-gated, package, provider, and benchmark claims.
epics.goal: Ensure MAIN validation language reports exactly what each command proves and does not turn default non-V8 success into V8/live-provider success.

epics.title: EPIC MAIN-03: Issue Cleanup Application Readiness
epics.summary: Prepare the tracker for MAIN.1 by reviewing stale parent EPICs, stale generated data, and public-doc deferral recommendations.
epics.goal: Approve an issue cleanup plan before mutating GitHub or creating any fresh MAIN/MAIN.1 issues.
nonGoals: No issue mutation inside the planning PR.
No closing issues without human approval.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-01.A: Define Supported MAIN Hello Contract
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-01: Executable Artifact-Path Alpha Verification
tasks.summary: Document the exact tiny source shape and artifact contract supported by ROADMAP MAIN.
tasks.goal: Make the MAIN hello workflow unambiguous before adding or changing tests.
scope: List unsupported source shapes and runtime behavior.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-01.B: Verify Deterministic MAIN Artifact Emission
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-01: Executable Artifact-Path Alpha Verification
tasks.summary: Verify sloppyc emits deterministic app.plan.json, app.js, and app.js.map for the MAIN hello contract.
tasks.goal: Protect the already-implemented compiler MVP as the stable MAIN artifact producer.
scope: Use existing compiler fixtures where possible.
Update goldens only for intentional contract changes.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-01.C: Verify V8-Gated MAIN Run Once
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-01: Executable Artifact-Path Alpha Verification
tasks.summary: Verify a V8-enabled sloppy run --artifacts --once GET / returns the expected MAIN hello HTTP response.
tasks.goal: Prove the minimal runtime path through V8, handler registration, dispatch, and response writing.
scope: Use the current classic bootstrap runtime.
Do not claim default non-V8 gates prove this task.
testsRequired: V8-enabled configure/build/test when SDK is available.
Default non-V8 diagnostic test if behavior changes.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-01.D: Verify Unsupported MAIN Paths Fail Clearly
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-01: Executable Artifact-Path Alpha Verification
tasks.summary: Verify unsupported source-input run and non-V8 run paths fail clearly instead of faking success.
tasks.goal: Keep MAIN honest about source handoff and V8 requirements.
scope: Confirm source-input sloppy run remains explicitly deferred.
Confirm non-V8 run diagnostics remain clear.
testsRequired: CTest CLI failure checks if touched.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-02.A: Document Default Non-V8 Evidence
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-02: MAIN Evidence and Gate Report
tasks.summary: Document what default Windows and hosted CI gates prove.
tasks.goal: Prevent default gate success from being reported as V8, live provider, or package-release success.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-02.B: Document V8 and Package Evidence
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-02: MAIN Evidence and Gate Report
tasks.summary: Document which commands prove V8-enabled MAIN execution and experimental package smoke.
tasks.goal: Keep V8 and package validation separate from default CI in PR and roadmap language.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-02.C: Document Live Provider and Benchmark Non-Claims
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-02: MAIN Evidence and Gate Report
tasks.summary: Document that MAIN does not prove live providers or performance claims by default.
tasks.goal: Avoid public alpha readiness claims based on skipped live provider tests or benchmark smoke.
scope: Clarify benchmark smoke is harness correctness.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-03.A: Review Stale Parent EPIC Closure List
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-03: Issue Cleanup Application Readiness
tasks.summary: Review stale parent EPICs with closed children before any GitHub mutation.
tasks.goal: Approve or revise the closure recommendations in current-issue-state-audit.md.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-03.B: Review EPIC-28 Public Docs Deferral
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-03: Issue Cleanup Application Readiness
tasks.summary: Review whether EPIC-28 should be re-scoped behind MAIN.1 hardening.
tasks.goal: Keep public alpha docs from overclaiming runtime, security, package, or data readiness.
scope: Decide what stays open, blocked, or deferred.

tasks.title: TASK MAIN-03.C: Apply Approved Issue Cleanup
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC MAIN-03: Issue Cleanup Application Readiness
tasks.summary: Apply approved close/relabel actions after human review.
tasks.goal: Clean stale GitHub state without closing or relabeling issues prematurely.
scope: Leave a concrete comment on every mutation.
Do not create new roadmap issues in the same pass unless approved.
testsRequired: gh issue list before and after.
